Class AnimalServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.impl.AnimalServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AnimalService
public class AnimalServiceImpl extends Object implements AnimalService
Default implementation of AnimalService backed by an AnimalRepository. Delegates all persistence operations to the repository and applies business-level validation such as shelter assignment on registration and adoption state checks on removal.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AnimalServiceImpl(AnimalRepository animalRepository)
    Constructs an AnimalServiceImpl with the given repository.

  • Constructor Details

    • AnimalServiceImpl

      public AnimalServiceImpl(AnimalRepository animalRepository)
      Constructs an AnimalServiceImpl with the given repository. The repository is used for all read and write operations on animal records.
      Parameters:
      animalRepository - the repository to delegate persistence to; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if animalRepository is null

  • Method Details

    • register

      public void register(Animal animal, Shelter shelter)
      Registers a new animal into the specified shelter. Throws an exception if the shelter is at capacity or the animal is already registered. Adds the animal to the shelter roster, then saves the animal record to the repository.
      Specified by:
      register in interface AnimalService
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to register
      shelter - the shelter to assign the animal to

    • update

      public void update(Animal animal)
      Updates the information of an existing animal record; the animal may be any subtype such as Dog, Cat, or Rabbit. Throws an exception if the animal is not found in the system. Throws EntityNotFoundException if the animal does not exist in the repository.
      Specified by:
      update in interface AnimalService
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal with updated information

    • remove

      public void remove(Animal animal)
      Removes an animal from the system and its associated shelter. Throws an exception if the animal is not found or has a pending adoption request. Throws EntityNotFoundException if the animal is not found.
      Specified by:
      remove in interface AnimalService
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to remove

    • getAnimalsByShelter

      public List<Animal> getAnimalsByShelter(Shelter shelter)
      Returns all animals currently registered in the specified shelter. Returns an empty list if the shelter has no animals.
      Specified by:
      getAnimalsByShelter in interface AnimalService
      Parameters:
      shelter - the shelter to query
      Returns:
      a list of animals in the shelter

    • registeredAfter

      public List<Animal> registeredAfter(LocalDate date)
      Returns all animals registered into the system after the given date. Returns an empty list if no animals were registered after that date. Uses the animal's shelter ID as a proxy for registration date — not natively tracked, so this returns all animals for now (field not yet in domain model).
      Specified by:
      registeredAfter in interface AnimalService
      Parameters:
      date - the cutoff date (exclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of animals registered after the date

    • adoptedAfter

      public List<Animal> adoptedAfter(LocalDate date)
      Returns all animals that were adopted after the given date. Returns an empty list if no animals were adopted after that date.
      Specified by:
      adoptedAfter in interface AnimalService
      Parameters:
      date - the cutoff date (exclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of animals adopted after the date

    • findById

      public Animal findById(String id)
      Returns the animal with the given ID. Throws an exception if no animal with that ID is found. Throws EntityNotFoundException if no animal with the given ID exists.
      Specified by:
      findById in interface AnimalService
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the animal
      Returns:
      the matching animal

    • adoptedBy

      public List<Animal> adoptedBy(Adopter adopter)
      Returns all animals adopted by the given adopter. Returns an empty list if the adopter has not adopted any animals.
      Specified by:
      adoptedBy in interface AnimalService
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter to query
      Returns:
      a list of animals adopted by the adopter
